user.title: Set up OkoVision
user.description: Enter the URL of your ha_api.php file and the authentication token (first 12 characters of your server TOKEN constant).

error.cannot_connect: Cannot connect to OkoVision API. Check the URL.
error.invalid_auth: Invalid token or access denied. Check the first 12 characters of your TOKEN.

abort.already_configured: This OkoVision instance is already configured.
